india_trends.summary: Marriott International sees strong growth in India with many new hotel deals. The company is launching its Autograph Collection brand in India, starting with Noormahal in Karnal. This expansion highlights India's importance as a key market for Marriott's development plans. india_trends.title: Yogi government to supply 34,000 MW power to consumers across UP
india_trends.summary: Under the directions of Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath, the Energy Department has prepared a strategy to make approximately 34,000 megawatt (MW) of electricity available this year, keeping peak demand in mind.

india_trends.title: India's consumer discretionary firms set for strong growth, demand recovery in Q4: Report
india_trends.summary: Consumer discretionary companies anticipate robust revenue and earnings growth in the March quarter of FY26. india_trends.title: Fall in provisions help ICICI Bank's net profit in Q4 FY26
india_trends.summary: ICICI Bank's net profit rose 9% to Rs 13,702 crore in March 2026, driven by stable loan growth and a significant drop in provisions. Total advances increased 16%, with strong contributions from business banking and rural portfolios. The bank maintained a healthy net interest margin and stable asset

india_trends.title: Network18 Q4 loss at Rs 29.61 crore, revenue up 9.7% to Rs 615.78 cr
india_trends.summary: Network18 Media & Investments reported a consolidated net loss of Rs 29.61 crore for the March quarter, despite a 9.7% rise in operational revenue to Rs 615.78 crore. The company highlighted strong performance in its TV news inventory and digital platforms, offsetting macro headwinds. Chairman A

india_trends.title: Gold ETFs deliver up to 60% returns since last Akshaya Tritiya. Should investors hold or book profits?
india_trends.summary: Akshaya Tritiya 2026: Since last Akshaya Tritiya, MCX gold prices have rallied approximately 63%, generating substantial gains for investors. On average, gold ETFs have generated returns in the range of 59–60% during the same period, with some funds even surpassing the 60% mark.

india_trends.title: Penny stock PC Jeweller to be in focus on Monday; here's why
india_trends.summary: PC Jeweller Ltd. has reduced its outstanding bank debt by approximately 10% as part of its ongoing debt reduction plan, repaying over 90% since the settlement agreement. Details here.

india_trends.title: Cabinet extends validity of third phase of rural road scheme, raises outlay to Rs 83,977 crore
india_trends.summary: The Union Cabinet has extended the Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana-III deadline to March 2028 for plain areas and March 2029 for mountainous areas. This revised outlay of Rs 83,977 crore aims to boost the rural economy by improving market access and reducing transport costs.

india_trends.title: Akshaya Tritiya 19th April 2026: What the scriptures actually say
india_trends.summary: Akshaya Tritiya is a significant date in the Vedic tradition. It signifies actions and intentions that compound over time. The day emphasizes giving and righteous conduct. Classical texts highlight jaldana, the offering of water, as particularly important. Stories of Indra and Draupadi's Akshaya Pat

india_trends.title: ICICI Bank Q4 Results: Net profit up 8.5% to Rs 13,702 crore, announces Rs 12 dividend
india_trends.summary: ICICI Bank announced a net profit of Rs 13,702 crore for the fourth quarter of FY26, an 8.5% year-on-year increase. The bank's net interest income also rose by 8.4% to Rs 22,979 crore during the same period, reflecting strong financial performance.

india_trends.title: ICICI Bank Q4 results: Profit rises 8.5% YoY
india_trends.summary: ICICI Bank, on Saturday, 18 April, announced its standalone profit for Q4FY26 rose by 8.5% year-on-year (YoY) to ₹13,701.68 crore, compared with a profit of ₹12,629.58 crore in the same quarter last year.

india_trends.title: Anil Ambani-owned Reliance Power share price jumps 40% this month. Do you own?
india_trends.summary: Anil Ambani-owned Reliance Power shares have risen from ₹20.36 apiece to ₹28.58 on the NSE in April 2026

india_trends.title: HDFC Bank Q4 Results: Net profit rises 9% to ₹19,221 crore, NII up 3.8% YoY; declares dividend of ₹13 per share
india_trends.summary: HDFC Bank Q4 results: Net Interest Income (NII) in Q4FY26 increased 3.8% to ₹33,281.5 crore from ₹32,066 crore, YoY.

india_trends.title: HDFC Bank Q4 Results: Net profit rises 9% to Rs 19,221 crore; announces Rs 13 dividend for FY26
india_trends.summary: HDFC Bank announced a net profit of Rs 19,221 crore for the March quarter, a 9% rise year-on-year. This growth was achieved despite a slight 1.1% decrease in interest income, which stood at Rs 76,610 crore compared to Rs 77,460 crore in the prior year's corresponding period.

india_trends.title: Akshaya Tritiya 2026: Gold Vs silver Vs gold stocks. Where should investors put their money this year?
india_trends.summary: Silver has significantly outperformed gold since last Akshaya Tritiya, delivering a remarkable 160% return compared to gold's nearly 58.7%. While gold remains a stable store of value, silver's demand from key industries fuels its rise, though with higher volatility. Gold jewellery stocks have also s

india_trends.title: F&O Talk: Midcaps, smallcaps stage sharp comeback, trade above key moving averages. What's the outlook?
india_trends.summary: Domestic markets closed higher on Friday, led by consumer and metal stocks, with Nifty and Sensex posting gains. Analyst Sudeep Shah of SBI Securities shared insights on Nifty and Bank Nifty's outlook, highlighting broader market strength and key levels to watch for the upcoming week.

india_trends.title: Yes Bank Q4 Results: Net profit rises 45% to Rs 1,068 crore, NII up 16% YoY
india_trends.summary: Yes Bank has announced impressive Q4 results. The private lender's net profit surged by 44.8% year-on-year. Net interest income also showed healthy growth. The bank's net interest margin improved, driven by lower deposit costs. This performance marks a positive financial period for Yes Bank.
